basic_details.job_title: APMSRB Recruitment 2026 - 529 Vacancies for Staff Nurse, Pharmacist & Multi Rehabilitation Worker Under NHM
basic_details.short_information: The Andhra Pradesh Medical Services Recruitment Board (APMSRB) has released Notification No. 10/2026 on 10 June 2026, inviting online applications for 529 contract posts - Staff Nurse (419), Pharmacist (24), and Multi Rehabilitation Worker (86) - under the National Health Mission (NHM). The online application window opens on 13 June 2026 and closes on 30 June 2026. All applications must be submitted exclusively through the official website https://apmsrb.ap.gov.in/msrb/.

application_fee.details: The fee must be paid online through the payment gateway (Net Banking, Credit Card, Debit Card, or Mobile Wallet) at the time of application.

qualification.details: All qualifications must be held as of the date of notification - 10 June 2026. Candidates should verify registration renewals are current before applying. | Staff Nurse Candidates must hold a B.Sc. Nursing or General Nursing & Midwifery (GNM) degree and must be registered with the Andhra Pradesh Nursing & Midwifery Council (APNMC) with an up-to-date renewal. | Pharmacist Candidates must hold a D.Pharma, B.Pharma, or an Intermediate Vocational Course in Pharmacy recognized by the Government of Andhra Pradesh, and must be registered with the AP Pharmacy Council with an up-to-date renewal. | Multi Rehabilitation Worker Candidates must have completed 10+2 or equivalent, a one-and-a-half-year certificate course in Multi Rehabilitation Work from a recognized university, and must be registered as Rehabilitation Personnel under the RCI Act, 1992. | The minimum age is 18 years and the maximum age is 42 years, calculated as on 01 January 2026 (as per G.O.Ms.No.36, GA (Ser-A) Dept., Dt. 04/03/2025). No candidate below 18 or above 42 years (before relaxation) is eligible. | Only Andhra Pradesh state candidates are eligible to apply. Candidates who studied from Class 4 to Class 10 in AP are considered local. Candidates who migrated from Telangana to AP within 3 years from 2 June 2014 are also eligible as local candidates (as per G.O.Ms.No.132 & 133, GAD, 13.06.2016). | DON'T MISSRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Posts • Technician • RRB29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Vacancies • Nursing Officer13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Openings • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,318 postsKSP Civil Police Constable Online Form 20263,991 Vacancies • Civil Police Constable • KSP03 Jul 20263,991 postsMPSC 2619 Group C Online Form 20262,619 Openings • Group C17 Jul 20262,619 posts

salary_details.details: All posts are on contract basis under NHM and carry a fixed monthly remuneration as follows:

selection_process: Weightage for Years Since Passing (@ 1 mark/year, up to PG/Super-Specialty) Up to 10
COVID-19 Duties 5.0 marks per 6 months (0.83 marks/completed month)
Tribal Area Service 2.5 marks per 6 months
Rural Area Service 2.0 marks per 6 months
Urban Area Service 1.0 mark per 6 months
Selection for APMSRB Recruitment 2026 is based entirely on merit and Rule of Reservation - there is no written examination. The total score of 100 marks is composed of three weighted components.
Candidates with prior NHM/Government contract service can earn up to 15 marks based on the type and duration of service:
Service of less than 6 months earns no weightage (except COVID-19
where each completed month counts individually). Separate spells of days cannot be clubbed.
The merit list prepared under this notification is valid for one year or until a fresh notification is issued
how_to_apply: Candidates wondering how to apply for APMSRB Recruitment 2026 should follow the online process exclusively - no offline or postal applications will be accepted under any circumstances.
Click on "Online Registration" on the homepage.
Select the name of the post you are applying for.
Fill in all required fields carefully - name must exactly match your certificates.
Enter your primary mobile number and email ID (all communications will be sent here).
Upload all required documents (see Document Checklist below) in PDF format.
Pay the application fee through the online payment gateway.
Wait for server confirmation - do not press Back or Refresh during payment.
Note your final Registration Number for all future reference.
Applications must be submitted between 13 June 2026 and 30 June 2026 (11:59 PM).

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for APMSRB Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application is 30 June 2026 up to 11:59 PM. Applications submitted after this deadline or through any offline mode will not be accepted.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in APMSRB Notification 10/2026?
faq.answer: There are 529 total vacancies — 419 for Staff Nurse, 24 for Pharmacist, and 86 for Multi Rehabilitation Worker. These include both backlog and regular vacancies and are tentative in nature.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for APMSRB 2026?
faq.answer: The fee is ₹1,200 for OC (General) candidates and ₹900 for SC, ST, BC, EWS, and PBD candidates. Payment must be made online through the portal's payment gateway.

faq.question: Q4. Is there a written exam for APMSRB Staff Nurse / Pharmacist recruitment?
faq.answer: No. Selection is entirely merit-based using a 100-mark system comprising qualifying examination marks (75), years-of-passing weightage (up to 10), and contract service weightage (up to 15). There is no written examination.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for Staff Nurse under APMSRB NHM 2026?
faq.answer: Staff Nurses appointed on contract under NHM will receive a monthly remuneration of ₹27,675. Pharmacists will receive ₹23,393 and Multi Rehabilitation Workers ₹23,494.

faq.question: Q6. Who is eligible to apply for APMSRB Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Only Andhra Pradesh state candidates are eligible. The age limit is 18 to 42 years as on 01 January 2026. Educational qualifications vary by post — B.Sc. Nursing or GNM for Staff Nurse, D.Pharma or B.Pharma for Pharmacist, and 10+2 plus MRW certificate course for Multi Rehabilitation Worker.

faq.question: Q7. What documents are needed for contract service weightage?
faq.answer: Candidates must upload the original contract appointment order and the Contract Service Certificate in Annexure V format, signed by DM&HO / DCHS or the Medical Superintendent with office seal. For COVID-19 weightage, a bank statement showing monthly remuneration and monthly attendance certificates are also mandatory.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I apply for APMSRB Notification 10/2026?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted exclusively online through https://apmsrb.ap.gov.in/msrb/. No other mode of application is accepted.

faq.question: Q9. Is age relaxation available for OBC / BC candidates?
faq.answer: Yes. Candidates belonging to Backward Classes (BC) are eligible for an age relaxation of 5 years, extending the upper age limit from 42 to 47 years (as on 01 January 2026).

faq.question: Q10. What happens if I submit incomplete documents?
faq.answer: Incomplete or incorrect applications will be summarily rejected. No documents will be accepted after online submission, and no individual correspondence will be entertained by APMSRB regarding incomplete applications.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for APMSRB Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application is 30 June 2026 up to 11:59 PM. Applications submitted after this deadline or through any offline mode will not be accepted.

title: APMSRB Recruitment 2026 - 529 Vacancies for Staff Nurse, Pharmacist & Multi Rehabilitation Worker Under NHM
